summary: Comprehensive testing of Trend Syria conditional free shipping feature. All 3 shipping scenarios tested and working correctly via API and frontend. Backend /api/shipping/cart endpoint fully functional. Frontend CheckoutPage correctly displays shipping costs that update based on address selection.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/shipping/info returns correct thresholds (150,000 threshold, 15,000 nearby, 25,000 far)
✅ Backend /api/shipping/cart returns correct empty cart response
✅ السيناريو 1: Single seller + same city (حلب) + 250,000 >= 150,000 = FREE shipping (shipping_cost=0, qualifies_for_free=true)
✅ السيناريو 2: Single seller + same city (دمشق) + 85,000 < 150,000 = 15,000 shipping + message 'أضف 65,000 ل.س للتوصيل المجاني'
✅ السيناريو 3: Single seller + different city (دمشق → حلب) = 25,000 shipping (no_free_option=true)
✅ Backend: Nearby city shipping (ريف دمشق from دمشق) = 15,000
✅ Frontend: Product detail page shows shipping calculator with city selector
✅ Frontend: Product page shows 'add more for free shipping' message when below threshold
✅ Frontend: Cart page shows 'يُحسب عند الدفع' (calculated at checkout) message
✅ Frontend: Checkout page shows shipping cost row with correct amount (25,000 ل.س for حلب → دمشق)
✅ Frontend: Checkout shows 'الشحن من حلب إلى دمشق' message explaining shipping route
✅ Frontend: Checkout total correctly includes shipping (250,000 + 25,000 = 275,000)
✅ Frontend: Free shipping banner visible: 'توصيل مجاني عند الشراء من متجر واحد بنفس المحافظة (أكثر من 150,000 ل.س)'
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - caused by Emergent wrapper, not a functional issue

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All shipping UI features verified working

seed_data_creation: Used existing test products: 3328c412-f7a7-45af-b3b7-d9022b5f79fb (قميص رجالي, 85,000 ل.س, دمشق) and 760ef5b7-1a73-4f73-a6fc-1b4f92e783d3 (فستان سهرة, 250,000 ل.س, حلب)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conditional free shipping feature fully tested. Shipping rules: FREE when single seller + same city + total >= 150,000. Otherwise: same city = 15,000, nearby cities = 15,000, far cities = 25,000. API endpoint: /api/shipping/cart?customer_city={city}. Frontend: CheckoutPage.js calls API on address change via useEffect. CartPage.js shows analysis messages.

list: ShamCash Payment API - /api/payment/shamcash/verify accepts any 6-digit OTP for testing

scenarios_tested.name: السيناريو 2: شحن 15,000 مع رسالة
scenarios_tested.result: shipping_cost = 15,000, message = 'أضف X ل.س للتوصيل المجاني'
